overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Ghost of Tsushima showing a samurai character walking through a coastal forest at night. The character travels from an open grassy hillside with palm trees down a winding dirt path through dense forest, eventually approaching an enemy camp with a campfire.

scene_state.functional_zone: coastal hillside with palm trees overlooking ocean

events.description: character walks from open coastal grassland into forested area with denser tree cover

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along coastal path from grassy hill toward forest edge

entered.detail: tall palm tree with green fronds swaying in breeze
moonlit ocean coastline visible in distance
lush green grass covering the hillside
narrow dirt trail winding through vegetation
bushes with small white flowers lining the path

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a moonlit coastal hillside with palm trees and ocean views. The samurai character walks along a dirt path through lush grass and white flowers, transitioning from open coastal terrain into a denser forested area.

scene_state.functional_zone: rocky forest trail with large boulders

events.description: location text 'Jogaku Forest' appears on screen identifying the area

agents.ego_description: walking along winding dirt path through rocky forest terrain with large boulders on the left

entered.detail: large gray rock formation jutting from the hillside
tall deciduous trees with dense green canopy

segments.scene_description: The character moves deeper into the forest along a narrow dirt path flanked by large rock outcrops and tall trees. The ocean view disappears behind the terrain as the location text 'Jogaku Forest' appears, indicating the specific region.

scene_state.functional_zone: dense forest path approaching enemy camp

events.description: distant orange campfire light becomes visible through the trees ahead

agents.ego_description: walking through increasingly dense forest toward the distant firelight

entered.detail: flickering orange glow of a campfire visible through the trees

segments.scene_description: The forest becomes denser with limited sky visibility, creating a darker atmosphere. The character continues along the path as a distant campfire light becomes visible through the trees, indicating an encampment ahead.

scene_state.functional_zone: forest camp approach with enemy presence

events.description: character slows approach as enemy soldiers become visible near the campfire

agents.ego_description: cautiously approaching the enemy camp through dense forest, preparing for potential combat

notable_agents.action: enemy soldiers standing near the campfire ahead

entered.detail: wooden structures and tents of the enemy camp
burning campfire illuminating the immediate area

segments.scene_description: The character approaches the enemy camp where the campfire now provides the primary light source. Enemy soldiers are visible near the fire as the character moves through the dense forest vegetation, transitioning from exploration to potential combat readiness.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a moonlit coastal hillside into the oppressive darkness of a dense forest. It begins with the samurai walking along a dirt path through lush grass and white flowers, with the open ocean visible beyond the palm trees. As the character moves deeper inland, the ocean view disappears behind large rock outcrops and tall trees, shifting the environment into the enclosed terrain of Jogaku Forest. The scene then grows darker as the canopy closes in, limiting sky visibility until a distant campfire light begins to flicker through the trees. Finally, the camera approaches an enemy encampment where the warm glow of the fire becomes the primary light source, illuminating soldiers stationed amidst the thick forest vegetation.
